parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { 'Full Name': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.fullName, 'Email Address': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.email, 'Business / Brand Name': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.businessName, 'Industry / Niche': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.industry, 'Website Type': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.websiteType, 'Pages / Sections Needed': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.pagesNeeded, 'Design Style': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.designStyle, 'Color Preferences': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.colorPreferences, 'Tone / Voice': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.tone, 'Tagline or Headline': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.tagline, 'Services or Offerings': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.services, 'About / Bio': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.about, 'Social Media Links': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.socialLinks, 'Example Sites They Like': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.exampleSites, 'Anything Else': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.anythingElse, 'Plan Selected': $('Validate Input').first().json.formData.planSelected, 'Status': 'Generating' } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const formData  = $('Validate Input').first().json.formData;
const requestId = $('Validate Input').first().json.requestId;
const recordId  = $('Create Airtable Record').first().json.id;

const systemPrompt = `You are an expert web designer and developer. Your job is to generate a complete, beautiful, fully functional website based on the details provided. You produce real, production-quality websites — not templates, not placeholders.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Decide the best format based on complexity:
- Simple sites (landing pages): return a single self-contained HTML file with all CSS and JS embedded inline.
- Multi-page or complex sites: return separate files, clearly labeled with headers like <!-- FILE: index.html -->, <!-- FILE: style.css -->, <!-- FILE: script.js -->.

Always state at the top which format you chose and why, in one sentence.

DESIGN RULES:
1. Match the user's design style and tone exactly.
2. Use the brand colors provided. If none given, choose a palette that fits the industry.
3. Choose Google Fonts that match the tone.
4. Mobile responsive by default using CSS Flexbox or Grid. Include hamburger menu on mobile.
5. No placeholder content. Use the actual details provided. Make professional assumptions for anything missing.
6. Strong hero section with headline, subheadline, and clear CTA button on every site.
7. Subtle CSS animations, hover effects, and smooth scrolling.
8. Semantic HTML5. Clean, commented code.

WEBSITE TYPES:
- Business: Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Contact form, Footer
- Portfolio: Hero, About/Bio, Work/Projects, Skills, Contact
- Landing page: Hero + CTA, Problem/Solution, Features, Social proof, Final CTA, Footer

CONTACT FORM: Use a mailto action with the client's email address.

OUTPUT STRUCTURE:
FORMAT CHOSEN: [Single file / Multi-file] — [one sentence reason]
---
<!-- FILE: index.html -->
[full code]
<!-- FILE: style.css --> (if multi-file)
[full code]
<!-- FILE: script.js --> (if multi-file)
[full code]

Do not add explanations after the code. Generate the complete site in one response.`;

const pages = Array.isArray(formData.pagesNeeded)
  ? formData.pagesNeeded.join(', ')
  : formData.pagesNeeded;

const lines = [
  'Business/Personal Name: ' + formData.businessName,
  'Website Type: '           + formData.websiteType,
  'Industry/Niche: '         + (formData.industry         || 'Not specified'),
  'Pages/Sections Needed: '  + (pages                    || 'Not specified'),
  'Design Style: '           + (formData.designStyle      || 'Not specified'),
  'Color Preferences: '      + (formData.colorPreferences || 'Not specified'),
  'Tone/Voice: '             + (formData.tone             || 'Not specified'),
  'Tagline or Headline: '    + (formData.tagline          || 'Not specified'),
  'Services or Offerings: '  + (formData.services         || 'Not specified'),
  'About/Bio: '              + (formData.about            || 'Not specified'),
  'Contact Email: '          + formData.email,
  'Social Media Links: '     + (formData.socialLinks      || 'Not specified'),
  'Example Sites They Like: '+ (formData.exampleSites     || 'Not specified'),
  'Anything Else: '          + (formData.anythingElse     || 'Not specified'),
];

const userMessage = lines.join('\n');

return [{ json: { systemPrompt, userMessage, formData, recordId, requestId } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-6', max_tokens: 8000, system: [{ type: 'text', text: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.systemPrompt, cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.userMessage }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your website is live, ' + $('Deploy to Cloudflare Pages').first().json.formData.fullName + '!' }}
parameters.message:
={{ (() => { const d = $('Deploy to Cloudflare Pages').first().json; return `

⚡ SiteSnap

Your website is live!

It took less than 60 seconds. Here's your link:

View Your Live Website →
${d.deploymentUrl}
Business${d.formData.businessName}
Website Type${d.formData.websiteType}
Plan${d.formData.planSelected}

Questions? Reply to this email — we're here to help.

© 2025 SiteSnap

`; })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Your website is being generated. You will receive an email shortly.', requestId: $('Validate Input').first().json.requestId }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '[SiteSnap] Workflow failed — ' + $json.execution.id }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

SiteSnap workflow failed

Execution ID: ' + $json.execution.id + '

Error: ' + ($json.execution.data.resultData.error && $json.execution.data.resultData.error.message || 'Unknown error') + '

Check n8n executions for details.

' }}
